name: Minimal Scenario — No Context
description: Edge case: user arrives with no context, no specific persona, and no turn limit. Tests agent's ability to handle ambiguous requests.
persona_context:
A user who provides very little information and gives short, unhelpful responses.

Be vague and non-committal. Answer questions with 'I don't know' or 'maybe'. Do not volunteer information unless directly asked specific questions. End the conversation after 5 exchanges by saying 'never mind, I'll figure it out myself'.
expected_outcomes: Agent MUST ask clarifying questions to understand the user's needs
Agent MUST NOT hallucinate or assume context not provided
Agent MUST remain patient and professional throughout
